headline: Charter’s US$7b Fiber Push Targets Growth Opportunity In Underserved Markets
summary: Charter Communications, NasdaqGS:CHTR, plans a US$7b expansion of its fiber broadband network. The company aims to reach 1.7 million additional underserved locations with multi gigabit speeds. The build out focuses on extending advanced broadband infrastructure to areas with limited high speed access. For you as an investor, this is a sizable infrastructure project for a large US cable and broadband provider. Charter Communications generates much of its business from broadband and related...
